programme.title: Horizons From PBS News
programme.desc: Science, health, technology and environment experts and professionals address issues such as artificial intelligence, medicine and climate science.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Rosalind is drawn into a troubling domestic situation; Joyce supervises the antenatal clinic at the hospital where she meets a worried single mother diagnosed with placenta previa.

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Jo hopes to fulfill newfound obligations while James's attempts to sabotage him intensify; June seeks solace with Philip; Soames promises Irene a move to Paris and support for her dancing.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: After escaping prison and discovering Mercedes' marriage, Edmond flees to Italy where he sails to Monte Cristo, transforms himself into the Count and plots his revenge.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb; Arthur and the gang create their own country, complete with no rules, laws or chores.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: The Triangle Cafe; Captain O's Birthday
programme.desc: Ozzi and Orli go on a mission to catch the villain who is ruining the Triangle Sisters' café; Opie must collect enough money to pay for Captain O's 10-layer birthday cake.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: The Kratt brothers try to find out why a cheetah cub has been adopted into a family of warthogs.

programme.title: Weather Hunters

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla feels guilty when she causes a group project to break; Lyla's glider toy gets stuck in a big puddle.

programme.desc: Carl loves the new sweater his Pop Pop knit him, but it feels itchy when he wears it; Carl is nervous about his new school bus stop.

programme.sub-title: Daniel Plays T-ball; Max Plays at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends play T-ball and find that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use a checklist to guide them through their tasks; Jay creates his first comic book and learns about the importance of page order.
